name: Center Hill Dam tailwater access (Caney Fork)
notes: Primary access below the dam; check generation schedule before wading.

name: Happy Hollow Access (Caney Fork)
notes: Ramp + bank access a short float below Center Hill Dam (approx. location).

name: Norris Dam tailwater / Songbird Trail (Clinch River)
notes: Wading productive during non-generation; rainbow, brown, brook.

name: Hiwassee River below Appalachia Powerhouse
notes: Quality trout water from powerhouse down to the L&N railroad bridge.

name: Wilbur Dam tailwater (Watauga River)
notes: Bank and put-in access below Wilbur Dam; see TWRA access map.
